emails.subject: FW: CEO apex depositions
emails.body: FW: CEO apex depositions Should we participate? If so, who would write it?

emails.subject: RE: CEO apex depositions
emails.body: RE: CEO apex depositions Agree with appellant's position and would be pleased to draft and file and amicus brief should you or any of the operating companies find it appropriate. I am out of the office today, but will be available tomorrow.
